plan: In FileField.__init__, save a reference to the original callable (e.g. self._storage_callable = self.storage) before evaluating it into a Storage instance. In FileField.deconstruct, when storage was provided as a callable, put that saved callable reference into kwargs['storage'] instead of the evaluated instance, mirroring how callable upload_to already deconstructs. This is a single-file fix at the point where the deconstructed reference is constructed; downstream migration machinery needs no changes.
